blocks.data:
## 📬 Before Day 1
You should have received an email from IT with a link to activate your **Google Workspace account** (`yourname@pipeshub.com`). Do this before day 1 — everything else depends on it.
If you haven't received the activation email by the day before your start date, email **it@pipeshub.com**.

## 🔑 Day 1 — Accounts & Access
Work through this list in order. Click items to mark them done.
Notion (company workspace) — sign in with Google at notion.soAuto
Linear (issue tracker) — sign in with Google at linear.appAuto
AWS console access — send your IAM username request to #eng-opsAsk @rahul
GitHub org membership (github.com/pipeshub) — ask @rahul to invite your handleAsk @rahul
1Password Teams — invite email will arrive once addedAsk @rahul
Slack — download the desktop app, sign in to `pipeshub.slack.com`Self

### Prerequisites
Confirm these are installed before cloning:

**Clone the repository**

bashCopy

```
git clone git@github.com:pipeshub/pipeshub-ai.git
cd pipeshub-ai
cp .env.example .env.local
```

Fill in `.env.local` from the values pinned in **#eng-onboarding**. Don't commit it.

**Install dependencies**

bashCopy

```
# Node / TypeScript
npm install

# Python service layer
pip install -r services/requirements.txt --break-system-packages
```

**Start all services**

bashCopy

```
docker compose up -d
npm run dev

# In a second terminal:
cd services && uvicorn main:app --reload
```

App at `http://localhost:3000` · API at `http://localhost:8000`

**Run the test suites — all should pass on a clean checkout**

bashCopy

```
npm test                   # TypeScript unit tests
cd services && pytest       # Python tests
npm run test:integration    # Requires Docker
```

Cadence: Friday, Event: Demo + retro, Format: Video call, Length: 45 min
Cadence: Biweekly, Event: 1:1 with manager, Format: Video call, Length: 30 min

blocks.data: PR must have a description, Linear issue link, and at least one test change
Request review from ≥1 person; ≥2 for anything touching auth or credentials
CI must be green before merging — no exceptions

## 🗂️ Codebase Orientation

pipeshub-ai/
├── src/ # TypeScript/Node.js backend
│   ├── controllers/ # Express route handlers
│   ├── services/ # Business logic
│   ├── connectors/ # Third-party API clients
│   └── webhooks/ # Inbound webhook handlers
├── services/ # Python async service layer
│   ├── agents/ # LangChain/LangGraph agent definitions
│   ├── connectors/ # Salesforce, Zoom, etc.
│   └── schemas/ # Pydantic models
├── tests/ # TypeScript tests
└── docs/ # Architecture docs, ADRs
